item1.description:
• Implemented a CRM for managing photographic content using Supabase (PostgreSQL), centralizing data administration and improving traceability.
• Designed an administrative management system in SQL Server under 3FN normalization, improving financial and organizational control.
• Developed a sales and ticket registration system with React and Supabase, automating Excel-based processes and reducing operational time and errors.
• Implemented ETL processes from Excel to databases using SQL and Power Query, automating data loading, cleaning and transformation.
• Built administrative dashboards integrating database and Excel data, improving visibility and analysis for decision making.
• Integrated APIs for data synchronization, automating flows and improving information consistency.

item2.position: Full Stack Developer / Oracle APEX Developer
item2.description:
• Built a responsive digital wallet landing page using Excalidraw, Figma, HTML, and CSS, improving navigation clarity, service communication, and the overall presentation of the product for potential users.
• Improved Oracle APEX interfaces using HTML, CSS, and functional enhancements, increasing readability, visual consistency, and usability across internal business workflows.
• Implemented PL/SQL validations and automations in Oracle Database, improving data consistency across multi-company processes.
• Built an ETL module for bulk Excel imports, reducing manual workload and accelerating academic data processing.

item3.description:
• Built the administrative frontend using React and Vite, converting complex internal processes into clearer workflows for non-technical staff, which improved day-to-day usability and supported faster system adoption.
• Designed and developed the institution’s landing page using responsive layouts and accessible content structures, improving how services were presented online and making information easier for users to understand and access.
• Implemented a frontend architecture based on Atomic Design and reusable components, improving visual consistency, code maintainability, and long-term scalability.
• Developed data-fetching and validation flows using TanStack Query, Axios, and Zod, reducing form errors and improving reliability in critical administrative processes.
• Integrated frontend workflows with C# .NET and MySQL services under layered architecture and Repository patterns, improving data consistency, system stability, and compliance with business rules across critical processes.
• Automated end-to-end testing with Cypress for critical workflows, reducing regression risk and increasing confidence in production releases.

title: Nuestra Señora del Rosario
description: I developed a complete informational website for the Santa Cruz Nursing Home, collaborating with my classmates in the engineering course working on the frontend and backend.

project2.title: Nuestra Señora Del Rosario - Admin
project2.description: This repository contains the frontend code for the Santa Cruz Nursing Home project. It's a responsive web application built with modern technologies to provide information about the nursing home services.

project7.title: Commercial Goals Calculator
project7.description: Web application designed for retail stores to calculate and distribute daily sales targets to advisors based on global goals, facilitating rate tracking and KPIs.

project8.title: Daniela Rodríguez - Psychologist
project8.description: Professional landing page designed to present psychological services in Nicoya, focusing on accessible design and optimized performance.

project9.title: EM & Asociados
project9.description: Professional landing page for a law firm in Costa Rica, featuring a modern design, specialized legal service sections, and high performance using Astro.

project10.title: RocaBussines
project10.description: Real estate and vehicle listing platform featuring a public landing page built with Astro and a CRM admin panel powered by Next.js, both backed by Supabase for data management.

project11.title: Jireh Adventure
project11.description: Optimized landing page created to attract customers and showcase tourism adventure services. Built with Astro, focused on speed, performance, and conversion.

project12.title: One Out Solutions
project12.description: Landing page built to sell web solutions and digital services, including web development, consulting, and client acquisition.

project13.title: One Out Creative
project13.description: Landing page for audiovisual services, marketing, web systems, design, and branding. Built to convert and showcase the brand portfolio.

project3.title: Course Manage
project3.description: This project is a web application designed for course management. It allows users to create and manage courses.

project4.title: Meta Gym
project4.description: Meta Gym is a landing page developed as a university project to present an integrated management software for gyms. It presents the solution's benefits, functionalities, and plans clearly.

project5.title: Gadea Fotografía
project5.description: A professional photography business website focused on capturing unforgettable moments and showcasing services for various clients and events.

project6.title: Digital Wallet
project6.description: A digital wallet web application for electronic money management, enabling users to perform secure operations, view transactions, and manage balances.
